records.snippet: Cooklang recipe with rich YAML frontmatter and structured steps for a steak dinner: 10-oz Ribeye and Mustard Peppercorn Sauce with Chive Mashed Potatoes and Roasted Broccoli.

Cooklang recipe for Vegetable Minestrone Soup with Parmesan Garlic Bread; includes frontmatter, notes, timers, ingredient quantities, and cookware references.
